text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Aw! And you were so close too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. What are you getting so worked up about?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We had fun, and that's all that matters. Well, to
me, anyways.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: All right, it's getting late. Let's head back!
